description: Set up a GTD (Getting Things Done) kanban workflow in BlueMail to organize your overwhelmed inbox by creating five folders: '01-Review', '02-Action-Required', '03-Waiting-Response', '04-Reference', and '05-Done'. Triage your inbox by moving at least 20 emails into these folders, ensuring every folder contains at least 2 emails. Draft or send an email to 'team-leads@projectalpha.com' with the subject 'New Workflow System' that lists the folder names and briefly explains the system.
